title: Your first feature title here
description: Describe exactly what needs to be built. Be specific: list files to create, classes or functions to implement, validations required, and tests to write. The more detail you provide, the better the agents perform. Example: 'Create src/models/user.py with a User class (id: int, name: str, email: str). Validate email with a basic regex. Write tests in tests/test_user.py covering: valid user creation, invalid email raises ValueError, to_dict/from_dict round-trip.'

title: Your second feature title here
description: Another feature description. Tips: (1) Reference files created by previous features so agents know what already exists. (2) Set 'e2e' to true only for features with a browser UI that needs Playwright testing — keep it false for backend features to save tokens. (3) Each feature should be independently deliverable and testable.

title: Your third feature title here
description: Add as many features as your project requires. The harness processes them in ascending id order. You can run a single feature with: 'Ejecuta solo la feature 3 y detente'. Failed features can be retried by resetting their status to 'pending' — see the README for the reset command.
